Archipelago.description:
First Integration of Archipelago in the randomizer mod.

**- Features -** 
1.) Connect to Archipelago using the config file! No additional client needed!
2.) 2 goals on first release! Either feed all creatures, or just enough to bring Pants to the yard!
3.) Mistake System returns, hard gating recipes. 
4.) Recipesanity! Each recipe is a check! Even mistakes!

**-Installation instructions-**
1.) Install BepinEXILC2PP from here - > https://builds.bepinex.dev/projects/bepinex_be
2.) Place all contents of BepInEx into the root folder for Creature Kitchen
3.) Run game to initialize BepInEx, then close it.
4.) Inside the BepinEX folder there will now be a "Plugins" folder, place the contents of the "CreatureKitchenRandoMod.zip" in there.
5.) Run the game to create config files! Close it after
6.) Tweak the config to your liking, turning on Archipelago mode overrides all other randomizer settings.


**Connecting to Archipelago!-**
1.) Install the apworld
2.) Create a yaml using generate template options or use the one attached here
3.) Generate a multiworld
4.) In the BepInEx folder go to the config folder. Open CreatureKitchenRando.cfg and change EnableArchipelago to True. Set your IP, port, SlotName, and Password.
5.) Open Creature Kitchen and press new game, you should connect to the server!
6.) If you need to refresh ingredients in the main room I suggest fully closing the game and using resume on restart. This fully resets the game but you should keep all checks, doors, ingredients, recipes, and fed creature count. Do not use New Game as this causes some checks to not resend and it also fully resets your fed creature count. Universal Tracker DOES work!


**-Known Issues-**
1.) The starting table key and the oddities room puzzle crest half should not ever function as keys. You will not be able to use them on doors, however, you do need to pick them up for checks. Picking them up locks them to your hand, but picking up anything else will cause them to disappear. 
2.) Be careful with any objects that can fall through the floor, like the shed items that get you the rose to summon moth. I have had the lost and found break a couple of times and I'm working on finding a solution.
Archipelago.title: Archipelago Integration - Update 0.5.0
